set.name: LORT-EOTA
set.longname: Legends Of Runeterra Conversion: Empires of the Ascended

card.name: Feral Prescience
card.text: Predict (Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.)

card.name: Ancient Hourglass
card.text: Target permanent you control phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.)

card.name: Ancient Preparations
card.text: Vanishing 2 When Ancient Preparations enters, Predict. (Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.) When Ancient Preparations is sacrificed with no time counters, create a Clockling token.

card.name: Arise!
card.text: Create X Sand Soldier tokens.

card.name: Ascended's Rise
card.text: Transform all legendary creatures you control.

card.name: Aspiring Chronomancer
card.text: When Aspiring Chronomancer enters, Predict. (Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.)

card.name: Azir, Shurima's Emperor
card.text: Ascended God-Warrior — Whenever one or more creatures you control attacks, create a tapped and attacking Sand Soldier token. Whenever you cast a creature or landmark, put an Emperor counter on Azir. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Azir has twelve or more Emperor counters, remove all Emperor counters from Azir, then transform him. Partner --- (Back): Azir, The Emperor of the Sands
card.related: Azir, The Emperor of the Sands

card.name: Azir, The Emperor of the Sands
card.text: Ascended God-Warrior — Whenever one or more creatures you control attacks, create a tapped and attacking Sand Soldier token. If you control an enchantment card named Restored Sun Disk, then whenever one or more creatures you control attacks, create a tapped and attacking Sandstone Charger token instead. Emperor of the Sands — If you control an enchantment card named Restored Sun Disk, Azir has "Spells you cast cost {U}{B} less to cast", and Azir has base power and toughness 6/6. Whenever a creature you control enters, Azir and that creature gets +1/+0 until the end of the turn. --- (Front): Azir, Shurima's Emperor

card.name: Baccai Reaper
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) Whenever a source you control destroys a creature or planeswalker, Baccai Reaper gets +1/+0.

card.name: Baccai Sandspinner
card.text: When Baccai Sandspinner enters, target creature an opponent gets -1/-0 and Vulnerable. (When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature of your choice that you control, even if that creature cannot normally block.)

card.name: Boomerang Blade
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to the creatures with the highest and lowest power among creatures target opponent controls.

card.name: Buried Sun Disc
card.text: If Buried Sun Disc is in your opening hand, you may begin the game with it on the battlefield. Vanishing 25 If Buried Sun Disc would be sacrificed with no time counters, transform it instead. --- (Back): Restored Sun Disk

card.name: Restored Sun Disk
card.text: Hexproof, Indestructible --- (Front): Buried Sun Disc

card.name: Call the Pack
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this card, shuffle one card from your hand into your library. Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal two creature cards with Lurk, add them to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Callous Bonecrusher
card.text: If you have Reputation: Callous Bonecrusher costs {1} less to cast and enters with Trample. (Whenever a creature you control deals 5 or more combat damage, you gain a Reputation counter. You have Reputation if you have four or more Reputation counters)

card.name: Careful Preparation
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this card, shuffle one card from your hand into your library. Predict (Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.)

card.name: Chronoshift
card.text: Until the end of your next turn, target legendary creature you control gets "The next time this creature would be destroyed, Regenerate it and put three +1/+1 counters on it.". (The next time that permanent would be destroyed this turn, it isn't. Instead tap it.)

card.name: Clockwork Curator
card.text: When Clockwork Curator enters, remove two time counters from a landmark you control.

card.name: Desert Naturalist
card.text: When Desert Naturalist enters, destroy target landmark. If a landmark you control is destroyed this way, create a Grumpy Rockbear token.

card.name: Desert's Wrath
card.text: When Desert's Wrath enters, create two Sand Soldier tokens. Creatures you control named Sand Soldier gets +1/+0.

card.name: Destined Poro
card.text: Whenever one or more legendary creatures you control transform, transform Destined Poro. --- (Back): Exalted Poro

card.name: Exalted Poro
card.text: When Exalted Poro transforms, randomly choose three abilities from among first strike, flying, deathtouch, double strike, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, skulk, trample, and vigilance. Exalted Poro gets these abilities. --- (Front): Destined Poro

card.name: Devoted Council
card.text: At the start of your upkeep, if you control a legendary creature, you gain 1 life. If you control a legendary creature that is transformed, you gain 2 life instead.

card.name: Dunekeeper
card.text: When Dunekeeper enters, create a Sand Soldier token.

card.name: Emperor's Dais
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures you control attack, create a tapped and attacking Sand Soldier token.

card.name: Emperor's Divide
card.text: All creatures controlled by opponents get Vulnerable until the end of the turn. (When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature of your choice that you control, even if that creature cannot normally block.) Create six Sand Soldier tokens.

card.name: Esteemed Hierophant
card.text: When Esteemed Hierophant enters, you may remove three time counters from a landmark you control named Buried Sun Disk.

card.name: Exhaust
card.text: Target creature an opponent controls gets -2/-0 and Vulnerable until the end of your next turn. (When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature of your choice that you control, even if that creature cannot normally block.)

card.name: Golden Ambassador
card.text: Allegiance: search your library for a legendary creature, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle. (When this creature enters, reveal the card on the top of your library, if the revealed card has the same colour identity as this creature, then search your library for a legendary creature, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle)

card.name: Hibernating Rockbear
card.text: Vanishing 3 When Hibernating Rockbear is sacrificed with no time counters, create a Grumpy Rockbear token.

card.name: Imagined Possibilities
card.text: Focus (This instant cannot be cast during the combat phase or in response to another spell or ability.) Choose one — • Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a landmark with Vanishing, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. • Remove a time counter from each landmark you control.

card.name: Inner Sanctum
card.text: If you have Reputation: You may cast Inner Sanctum without paying its mana cost. (Whenever a creature you control deals 5 or more combat damage, you gain a Reputation counter. You have Reputation if you have four or more Reputation counters) Vanishing 1 When Inner Sanctum is sacrificed with no time counters, target creature you control randomly gets two from among Trample, Absorb 1, First strike, Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.), Challenger (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.), +2/+0, +1/+1, +0/+2, a spellshield counter. (The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)

card.name: Inspiring Marshal
card.text: Whenever a creature you control enters, it gets +2/+0 until the end of your turn.

card.name: Khahiri the Returned
card.text: When Khahiri enters, create an exact token copy of Khahiri with no abilities, then shuffle Khahiri into your library. If Khahiri appears whenever you Scry, Surveil, or Predict, reveal it, then put two +1/+1 counters on all creatures named Khahiri the Returned you control. (Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.)

card.name: Khahiri the Student
card.text: When Khahiri the Student enters, put a +1/+1 counter on Khahiri the Student if you have looked at the top of your library this turn.

card.name: Merciless Hunter
card.text: When Merciless Hunter enters, target creature an opponent controls gets Vulnerable. (When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature of your choice that you control, even if that creature cannot normally block.)

card.name: Nasus, The Curator of the Sands
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) Whenever a source you control destroys a creature or planeswalker, put a +1/+1 counter on Nasus. If Nasus deals 10 or more combat damage in one combat phase, then at the start of the next post-combat main phase, transform him. Partner --- (Back): Nasus, The Scholar

card.name: Nasus, The Scholar
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) Whenever a source you control destroys a creature or planeswalker, put a +1/+1 counter on Nasus. Ascended God-Warrior — Creatures your opponents control have -1/-0. If you control an enchantment card named Restored Sun Disk, creatures your opponents control have -3/-0 instead and Nasus has base power and toughness 10/10. --- (Front): Nasus, The Curator of the Sands
card.related: Nasus, The Curator of the Sands

card.name: Payday
card.text: Target creature you control randomly gets one from among Trample, Absorb 1, First strike, Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.), Challenger (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.), +2/+0, +1/+1, +0/+2, or a spellshield counter. (The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)

card.name: Preservarium
card.text: Vanishing 2 When Preservarium enters, draw a card. When Preservarium is sacrificed with no time counters, draw a card.

card.name: Preservationist
card.text: When Preservationist enters, remove three time counters from a landmark you control.

card.name: Profiteer
card.text: When Profiteer enters, target other creature you control randomly gets one from among Trample, Absorb 1, First strike, Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.), Challenger (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.), +2/+0, +1/+1, +0/+2, or a spellshield counter (The first time an instant, sorcery, or activated ability targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)

card.name: Promising Future
card.text: Enchant landmark with vanishing. Whenever a time counter would be removed from enchanted landmark, remove that many plus one instead.

card.name: Quicksand
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature an opponent controls gets -4/-0 until the end of your turn. • Two target creatures an opponent controls gets -1/-0 until the end of your turn. The target creatures have no abilities until the end of turn.

card.name: Rampaging Baccai
card.text: Trample When Rampaging Baccai enters, if sources you control destroyed four or more creatures and/or planeswalkers this turn, Rampaging Baccai fights target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Raz Bloodmane
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) When Raz Bloodmane attacks, all creatures opponents control get -2/-0 until your next turn.

card.name: Rek'Sai, The Void Burrower
card.text: Lurk (The first time each turn one or more creatures you control with Lurk attacks, reveal the top card of your library, if the revealed card has Lurk, you get a Lurk counter. All creatures you control with Lurk have +X/+0 where X is equal to the number of Lurk counters you have.) Whenever Rek'Sai attacks you get a Lurk counter. If Rek'Sai attacked and did not transform, at the end of the turn, shuffle Rek'Sai into your library. If Rek'Sai dealt 10 or more combat damage in one combat phase, then at the start of the next post-combat main phase, transform her. Partner --- (Back): Rek'Sai, Scourge of the Desert

card.name: Rek'Sai, Scourge of the Desert
card.text: Trample, Lurk (The first time each turn one or more creatures you control with Lurk attacks, reveal the top card of your library, if the revealed card has Lurk, you get a Lurk counter. All creatures you control with Lurk have +X/+0 where X is equal to the number of Lurk counters you have.) When Rek'Sai transforms, search your library for up to three creatures with Lurk, reveal them, add them to your hand, then shuffle. When Rek'Sai attacks you gain a Lurk counter. --- (Front): Rek'Sai, The Void Burrower

card.name: Renekton, Gatekeeper of Shurima
card.text: Trample Whenever Renekton becomes blocked, Renekton gets +2/+1 until the end of turn. Whenever Renekton deals combat damage, put that many Butcher counters onto Renekton. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Renekton has ten or more Butcher counters, remove all Butcher counters from Renekton, then transform him. Partner --- (Back): Renekton, The Butcher of the Sands
card.related: Renekton, The Butcher of the Sands

card.name: Renekton, The Butcher of the Sands
card.text: Trample Ascended God-Warrior — Whenever Renekton attacks, Renekton gets +3/+3 until the end of turn. If you control an enchantment card named Restored Sun Disk, Renekton has base power and toughness 10/10 and has "Whenever Renekton blocks or is blocked, Renekton deals 2 damage to target opponent and each creature they control." --- (Front): Renekton, Gatekeeper of Shurima

card.name: Ricochet
card.text: If you have Reputation: This spell costs {3} less to cast. (Whenever a creature you control deals 5 or more combat damage, you gain a Reputation counter. You have Reputation if you have four or more Reputation counters) Ricochet randomly deals 1 damage to an opponent or a creature an opponent controls. Repeat this process four times.

card.name: Rite of Calling
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this card sacrifice a nontoken creature or untapped land you control. Search your library for a legendary creature, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Rite of Dominance
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this card sacrifice a nontoken creature or untapped land you control. All creatures your opponents control get -2/-0 until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Rite of Negation
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this card sacrifice a nontoken creature or untapped land you control. Exile each other spell.

card.name: Rock Hopper
card.text: When Rock Hopper enters, create a Roiling Sands token.

card.name: Roiling Sands LORT-EOTA
card.text: When a creature an opponent controls enters, sacrifice Roiling Sands and give that creature Vulnerable. (When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature of your choice that you control, even if that creature cannot normally block.)

card.name: Ruin Runner
card.text: Trample Ruin Runner enters with a spellshield counter. (The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)

card.name: Ruinous Path
card.text: Draw a card. If a source you control destroyed a creature or planeswalker this turn, Drain 2 from target opponent. (Ruinous Path deals 2 damage. You gain that much life.)

card.name: Ruthless Predator
card.text: Give target creature you control +2/+0 until the end of the turn, then give target creature an opponent controls Vulnerable until the end of the turn. (When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature of your choice that you control, even if that creature cannot normally block.)

card.name: Sai Scout
card.text: When Sai Scout enters, Predict. (Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.) If you put a landmark to the top of your library during the Prediction, you may reveal it, if you do, put a skulk counter on Sai Scout. (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.)

card.name: Salt Spire
card.text: Vanishing 2 When Salt Spire is sacrificed with no time counters, create a Grumpy Rockbear token, then if there are four or more landmarks in your graveyard, put two +1/+1 counters on the creature with the highest power among creatures you control.

card.name: Sanctum Conservator
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) When Sanctum Conservator enters, destroy target creature an opponent controls. If sources you control have destroyed thirteen or more creatures and/or planeswalkers this turn, destroy all creatures target opponent controls instead, then create a token copy of Sanctum Conservator with no abilities.

card.name: Sand Soldier LORT-EOTA
card.text: Ephemeral (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.) When Sand Soldier deals combat damage to an opponent, Sand Soldier deals 1 damage to that opponent.

card.name: Sandcrafter
card.text: Whenever Sandcrafter attacks, create a tapped and attacking Sand Soldier token.

card.name: Sandstone Charger LORT-EOTA
card.text: Ephemeral (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.)

card.name: Sandstone Chimera
card.text: Sandstone Chimera costs {1} less for each creature you control that attacked this turn.

card.name: Sandswept Tomb
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures you control attack, create a tapped and attacking Sandstone Charger token.

card.name: Scrying Sands
card.text: Predict (Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.) Give target creature an opponent controls -2/-0 until the end of turn.

card.name: Shaped Stone
card.text: Target creature you control gets +1/+1 until the end of your turn. If you control a landmark, the target creature you control gets +2/+1 until the end of your turn instead.

card.name: Shifting Sands
card.text: Shifting Sands deals 4 damage to target creature an opponent controls. Create two Sand Soldier tokens.

card.name: Siphoning Strike
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls. If the target creature controlled by the opponent is destroyed, each legendary creature you control gets two +1/+1 counters.

card.name: Sivir, The Battle Mistress
card.text: First strike Sivir enters with a spellshield counter (The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.) Whenever creatures you control deals combat damage, put that many Mercenary counters onto Sivir. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Sivir has thirty or more Mercenary counters, remove all Mercenary counters from Sivir, then transform her. Partner --- (Back): Princess Sivir

card.name: Princess Sivir
card.text: First strike When Princess Sivir transforms, put a spellshield counter onto Princess Sivir. (The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.) When Princess Sivir attacks, all other attacking creatures you control gain first strike until end of turn if Princess Sivir has first strike. The same is true for flying, deathtouch, double strike, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, skulk, trample, and vigilance. --- (Front): Sivir, The Battle Mistress

card.name: Shaman Soothsayer
card.text: When Shaman Soothsayer enters, put a spellshield counter on all legendary creatures and landmarks you control. (The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)

card.name: Spirit Fire
card.text: Give all creatures target opponent controls -2/-0 until the end of the turn and "At the beginning of your end step, put two -1/-1 counters on this creature."

card.name: Stoneweaving
card.text: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a landmark, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Taliyah, The Wanderer
card.text: When Taliyah enters, you may create an exact token copy of a landmark you control. Whenever a you cast a landmark, put a Stone counter on Taliyah. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Taliyah has five or more Stone counters, remove all Stone counters from Taliyah, then transform her. Partner --- (Back): Taliyah, The Stoneweaver

card.name: Taliyah, The Stoneweaver
card.text: When Taliyah transforms, you may create an exact token copy of a landmark you control. Whenever Taliyah is blocked, before combat damage, Taliyah deals 2 damage to its blocker. If Taliyahs blocker is destroyed or is removed, Taliyah deals 2 damage to that creatures controller instead. Repeat this process two times. --- (Front): Taliyah, The Wanderer

card.name: The Clock Hand
card.text: When The Clock Hand enters, choose two — • Remove four time counters from target landmark you control. • Search your library for a landmark, reveal it, then put it onto the battlefield under your control, then shuffle.

card.name: The Time Has Come
card.text: Create a Clockling token. If you have looked at the top of your library this turn, create two Clockling tokens instead.

card.name: Time Bomb LORT-EOTA
card.text: When Time Bomb enters, roll a d4. Time Bomb has Vanishing X where X is equal to the result of the d4. When Time Bomb is sacrificed with no time counters, Time Bomb deals 1 damage to each opponent and each creature and planeswalker they control.

card.name: Time in a Bottle
card.text: Focus (This instant cannot be cast during the combat phase or in response to another spell or ability.) Predict (Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.) Remove two time counters from target permanent you control.

card.name: Treasure Seeker
card.text: Kicker {1}{U}{B} (You may pay an additional {1}{U}{B} as you cast this spell.) If this spell was kicked, create a Sandstone Charger token.

card.name: Unraveled Earth
card.text: Create two Roiling Sands tokens. Draw a card.

card.name: Unworthy
card.text: Target creature an opponent controls gets -4/-0 until the end of your next turn. If you control less land then the target creatures controller, the creature is destroyed instead.

card.name: Vekauran Bruiser
card.text: Whenever Vekauran Bruiser enters or deals combat damage, target creature you control randomly gets one from among Trample, Absorb 1, First strike, Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.), Challenger (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.), +2/+0, +1/+1, +0/+2, or a spellshield counter (The first time an instant, sorcery, or activated ability targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)

card.name: Vekauran Safecracker
card.text: When Vekauran Safecracker enters, give a creature you control +2/+0 to give target creature an opponent controls -2/-0 until the end of your turn.

card.name: Vekauran Vagabond
card.text: When Vekauran Vagabond enters, choose one — • Search your library and/or graveyard and/or exile for a card named Warlord's Palace, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle. • Remove two time counters from a landmark named Warlord's Palace you control.

card.name: Voice of the Risen
card.text: Whenever a legendary creature you control transforms, put a Voice counter on Voice of the Risen. If Voice of the Risen has a Voice counter, each other creature you control gets +2/+0.

card.name: Waking Sands
card.text: Create a Sandstone Charger token.

card.name: Weight of Judgment
card.text: Choose one — • Weight of Judgment deals 4 damage to target creature. • Weight of Judgment deals 2 damage to target planeswalker.

card.name: Xenotype Researchers
card.text: When Xenotype Researchers enters, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three creatures, exile all three creatures revealed this way, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. You may cast the creatures exiled this way from exile for as long as they remain exiled. Whenever a creature exiled this way enters, put three +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Xer'sai Caller
card.text: Lurk (The first time each turn one or more creatures you control with Lurk attacks, reveal the top card of your library, if the revealed card has Lurk, you get a Lurk counter. All creatures you control with Lurk have +X/+0 where X is equal to the number of Lurk counters you have.) When Xer'sai Caller enters, Predict (Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.)

card.name: Xer'sai Dunebreaker
card.text: Trample, Lurk (The first time each turn one or more creatures you control with Lurk attacks, reveal the top card of your library, if the revealed card has Lurk, you get a Lurk counter. All creatures you control with Lurk have +X/+0 where X is equal to the number of Lurk counters you have.)

card.name: Xer'sai Hatchling
card.text: Fearsome, Lurk (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. The first time each turn one or more creatures you control with Lurk attacks, reveal the top card of your library, if the revealed card has Lurk, you get a Lurk counter. All creatures you control with Lurk have +X/+0 where X is equal to the number of Lurk counters you have.)

card.name: Xerxa'Reth, The Undertitan
card.text: Lurk (The first time each turn one or more creatures you control with Lurk attacks, reveal the top card of your library, if the revealed card has Lurk, you get a Lurk counter. All creatures you control with Lurk have +X/+0 where X is equal to the number of Lurk counters you have.) Whenever Xerxa'Reth attacks, if Xerxa'Reth has power 8 or greater, Xerxa'Reth gets Fearsome and Trample until the end of the turn, then put a shield counter on Xerxa'Reth. (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.)

card.name: Zilean
card.text: When Zilean enters, create four Time Bomb tokens, then predict. (Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.) Whenever a Time Bomb is sacrificed with no time counters, put a Chrono counter on Zilean. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Zilean has two or more Chrono counters, remove all Chrono counters from Zilean, then transform him. Partner --- (Back): Zilean, The Chronokeeper

card.name: Zilean, The Chronokeeper
card.text: When Zilean transforms, create four Time Bomb tokens. At the start of your upkeep, you may exile up to three cards from your graveyard, if you do, create an exiled copy of each card exiled this way. Until the start of your next turn, you may cast these copies from exile. --- (Front): Zilean

card.name: Golden Herald
card.text: When Golden Herald enters, and at the start of your upkeep, create two Sand Soldier tokens.

card.name: Emperor's Prosperity
card.text: Draw two cards.

card.name: Crumbling Sands
card.text: Exile target creature. Draw a card.

card.name: Shimmering Mirage
card.text: Create a token copy of target creature you control, it gets Ephemeral. Draw a card. (That creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.)

card.name: Eternal Gladiator
card.text: Eternal Gladiator enters with a shield counter. When Eternal Gladiator enters, draw a card. At the beginning of your end step, Eternal Gladiator fights the creature with the highest power amongst creatures opponents control.

card.name: General's Palace
card.text: Creatures your opponents control have Vulnerable. (When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature of your choice that you control, even if that creature cannot normally block.) At the end of the first combat phase on your turn, after this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: Emperor's Guard
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) When Emperor's Guard enters, draw a card.

card.name: Shurima's Sandstorm
card.text: Exile up to three target creatures and/or enchantments.

card.name: Ascended's Call
card.text: Search your library for up to two legendary creature cards, put them onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Song of the Isles
card.text: Target creature you control gets Lifelink, Fearsome, and Ephemeral. (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. That creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.)

card.name: Spirit Leech
card.text: When Spirit Leech enters, sacrifice a creature you control to draw two cards.

card.name: Sea Scarab
card.text: Deep (The first time your library has one third of the total starting cards left, you are Deep for the rest of the game. When you are Deep, all Deep creatures you control get +3/+3.) Whenever a creature you control is destroyed, Toss 1. (Exile a card from the bottom of your library.)

card.name: Mask Mother
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) When Mask Mother enters, mutate a creature you control under Mask Mother.

card.name: Unto Dusk
card.text: Draw a card. Nightfall: activate the Nightfall ability of target creature you control. You may choose new targets for that ability. (If this spell is not the first spell you have cast this turn, when this spell is cast, activate the Nightfall ability of target creature you control. You may choose new targets for that ability)

card.name: Soulspinner
card.text: When Soulspinner enters, if a creature you control has been destroyed this turn, Soulspinner gets a +1/+1 counter and Fearsome. (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.)

card.name: The Etherfiend
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) When The Etherfiend enters, sacrifice a creature you control to destroy target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Lamb's Respite
card.text: The creature with the lowest power among creatures you control has Indestructible until the end of the turn.

card.name: Honored Lord
card.text: The first time one or more creatures block Honored Lord, put a shield counter on Honored Lord.

card.name: Kindred, The Eternal Hunters
card.text: First strike The first time each turn, whenever a source you control destroys a creature or planeswalker, put a Slay counter onto the creature with the lowest power among creatures opponents control. At the beginning of your end step, each opponent sacrifices each creature they control with a Slay counter. Whenever a source you control destroys a creature or planeswalker, put a Reaper counter onto Kindred. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Kindred has two or more Reaper counters, remove all Reaper counters from Kindred, then transform Kindred. Partner --- (Back): Kindred, The Spirit of Death

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Sheep Wolf Spirit Avatar

card.name: Kindred, The Spirit of Death
card.text: First strike The first time each turn, whenever a source you control destroys a creature or planeswalker, put a Slay counter onto the creature with the lowest power among creatures opponents control, then put two +1/+1 counters on Kindred. At the beginning of your end step, each opponent sacrifices each creature they control with a Slay counter. --- (Front): Kindred, The Eternal Hunters

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Sheep Wolf Spirit Avatar

card.name: Spirit Journey
card.text: Destroy target creature you control, if that creature would enter the graveyard, exile it instead, then return it to the battlefield under its owners control.

card.name: Crimson Bloodletter
card.text: The first time a creature you control enters on the same turn Crimson Bloodletter entered, Crimson Bloodletter deals 1 damage to that creature and gets a +1/+1 counter.

card.name: Strength in Numbers
card.text: Create two 3/2 Legion Marauder tokens.

card.name: Shrieking Spinner
card.text: Whenever Shrieking Spinner attacks, each spider creature you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Bloody Business
card.text: If you have Reputation: Bloody Business costs {2} less to cast. (Whenever a creature you control deals 5 or more combat damage, you gain a Reputation counter. You have Reputation if you have four or more Reputation counters) Target creature you control with power 5 or greater deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Thorn of the Rose
card.text: When Thorn of the Rose enters, put a stun counter onto target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Black Rose Spy
card.text: If you have Reputation: When Black Rose Spy enters, you may have Black Rose Spy enter as copy of a creature you control that dealt combat damage this turn. (Whenever a creature you control deals 5 or more combat damage, gain a Reputation counter. You have Reputation if you have 4 or more Reputation counters)

card.name: LeBlanc, Pale Sorceress
card.text: First strike Whenever creatures you control deals combat damage, put that many Deceiver counters onto LeBlanc. At the end of any phase on your turn, if LeBlanc has fifteen or more Deceiver counters, remove all Deceiver counters from LeBlanc, then transform her. Partner --- (Back): LeBlanc, The Deceiver

card.name: LeBlanc, The Deceiver
card.text: First strike Whenever creatures you control deals a total of fifteen or more combat damage, create an exact token copy of target creature you control, it gets Ephemeral. (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.) --- (Front): LeBlanc, Pale Sorceress

card.name: Sigil of Malice
card.text: If you have Reputation: Sigil of Malice costs {2} less to cast. (Whenever a creature you control deals 5 or more combat damage, you gain a Reputation counter. You have Reputation if you have four or more Reputation counters) Sigil of Malice deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Whispered Words
card.text: If you have Reputation: Whispered Words costs {3} less to cast. (Whenever a creature you control deals 5 or more combat damage, you gain a Reputation counter. You have Reputation if you have four or more Reputation counters) Draw two cards.

card.name: Black Rose Mimicry
card.text: If you have Reputation: Black Rose Mimicry costs {3} less to cast. (Whenever a creature you control deals 5 or more combat damage, you gain a Reputation counter. You have Reputation if you have four or more Reputation counters) Copy the next spell you cast this turn targeting the same targets.

card.name: Startipped Peak
card.text: Vanishing 2 When Startipped Peak is sacrificed with no time counters, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal four Celestial cards with mana value 3 or less, randomly choose two and add them to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Destiny's Call
card.text: Until the end of your next turn, the next creature you cast enters with eight +1/+1 counters.

card.name: Field Musicians
card.text: Attune {C} (When a creature with Attune enters, add {C}. This mana can only be used used to cast instants and sorceries.) The first time you cast your third creature each turn, add {C}{C}{C} and draw a card.

card.name: Shadow Apprentice
card.text: Shadow (This creature can block or be blocked by only creatures with shadow.) Whenever a creature you control with Ephemeral enters, Shadow Apprentice gets +1/+0 until end of turn. (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.)

card.name: Lost Riches
card.text: Roll a d20. [b]1-7 [/b]| Create a Treasure Trove token. [b]8-14 [/b]| Create a Keelbreaker Token. [b]15-20 [/b]| Create three Vicious Platewyrm tokens.

card.name: Loaded Dice
card.text: During your next turn, whenever a source you control deals damage to an opponent, Nab 1 from that opponent. (Exile a card from the bottom of target opponents library. You may cast cards exiled this way for as long as it remains exiled, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any colour to cast that copy. )

card.name: Fading Icon
card.text: When Fading Icon enters, create a Prey token.

card.name: Golden Aegis
card.text: Put a shield counter on target creature you control. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: Cataclysm
card.text: Target creature you control and target creature an opponent controls fight. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)

card.name: Battlefield Prowess
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Penitent Squire
card.text: When Penitent Squire enters, you may Behold a Knight, if you do, the next creature you cast enters with Challenger. (To behold a Knight, if you do, the next creature you cast enters with Challenger., choose a Knight, if you do, the next creature you cast enters with Challenger. you control or reveal a Knight, if you do, the next creature you cast enters with Challenger. card from your hand.)

card.name: King Jarvan IV
card.text: King Jarvan IV enters with a shield counter. During the combat phase, if one or more creatures you control are attacking, you may cast King Jarvan IV as though he had Flash. If you cast King Jarvan IV this way, he enters tapped and attacking and you may have target creature an opponent controls block King Jarvan IV. Whenever a creature you control is blocked and is not destroyed by combat damage, put a Crown counter on King Jarvan IV. At the end of any phase on your turn, if King Jarvan IV has three or more Crown counters, remove all crown counters from King Jarvan IV, then transform him. Partner --- (Back): King Jarvan IV, The Exemplar of Demacia
card.related: King Jarvan IV, The Exemplar of Demacia

card.name: King Jarvan IV, The Exemplar of Demacia
card.text: When King Jarvan IV transforms, put a shield counter on him. At the start of your upkeep, you may have target creature you control fight target creature an opponent controls. Whenever one or more creatures block King Jarvan IV, put a shield counter on King Jarvan IV. --- (Front): King Jarvan IV

card.name: Gallant Rider
card.text: The first time Gallant Rider is blocked, Gallant Rider has base power and toughness 5/5 and gets Absorb 1. (If a source would deal damage to this creature, prevent 1 of that damage.)

card.name: King Jarvan III
card.text: Absorb 1 When King Jarvan III enters, you may search your library for a card named King Jarvan IV, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Then each other creature you control has Vigilance and Challenger until end of turn. (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.)

card.name: Towering Stonehorn
card.text: Towering Stonehorn has protection from instants, sorceries, and creature abilities opponents control.

card.name: Dragon Chow
card.text: Whenever a dragon creature you control enters, it deals damage equal to its power to Dragon Chow, then you draw a card.

card.name: Production Surge
card.text: X can't be 0. Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal X artifact creature cards. Put any number of artifact creature cards with total mana value X or less from among them onto the battlefield and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Concurrent Timelines
card.text: Until the end of the turn, whenever you cast a creature, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three creature cards with the same mana value as that creature, pick one, then shuffle the cast creature and all other revealed cards into the library, then put the chosen creature onto the battlefield.

card.name: Ancestral Boon
card.text: The next creature you control enters with two +1/+1 counters. If you are Enlightened: Each creature you control enters with two +1/+1 counters for the rest of the turn instead. (The first time you spend 10 or more mana in the same turn, you are Enlightened for the rest of the game.)

card.name: Spoils of War
card.text: Target creature you control gets +1/+2. Plunder: target creature you control gets +2/+4 instead. (If an opponent was dealt damage this turn, when this spell is cast target creature you control gets +2/+4 instead.)

card.name: Blighted Ravine
card.text: Vanishing 1 When Blighted Ravine enters, you gain 2 life. When Blighted Ravine is sacrificed with no time counters, Blighted Ravine deals 2 damage to each opponent and each creature and planeswalker they control.

card.name: Cold Resistance
card.text: Add one of any colour. Target creature you control gets +0/+2.

card.name: Three Sisters
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature an opponent controls gets Frostbite. (A creature with frostbite gains -X/-0 where X is that creatures power until the end of the turn.) • Target creature you control gets +3/+4 until end of turn. • Target permanent you control phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.)

card.name: Ice Shard
card.text: Ice Shard deals 1 damage to each player and each creature and planeswalker they control.

card.name: Entomb
card.text: Target creature you control phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.)

card.name: Draklorn Inquisitor
card.text: When Draklorn Inquisitor enters create a Frozen Thrall token. At the beginning of your end step, if an enchantment you control named Frozen Thrall has 4 or less time counters, remove all time counters from that enchantment.

card.name: Frozen Thrall
card.text: Vanishing 9 (This permanent enters with nine time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter from it. When the last is removed, sacrifice it.) When Frozen Thrall is sacrificed with no time counters, create a Frostguard Thrall token.

card.name: Lissandra, The Ice Witch
card.text: Absorb 1 When Lissandra enters create create a Frostguard Thrall token. Whenever you cast a creature with mana value 8 or more, put a Frostguard counter on Lissandra. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Lissandra has two or more Frostguard counters, remove all Frostguard counters from Lissandra, then transform her. Partner --- (Back): Lissandra, Lady of Ice and Darkness
card.related: Lissandra, Lady of Ice and Darkness

card.name: Lissandra, Lady of Ice and Darkness
card.text: Absorb 1 When Lissandra transforms, create a The Watcher token. At the start of your turn, Lissandra deals 1 damage to each player and each creature and planeswalker they control. If a source would deal damage to you, prevent 1 of that damage. --- (Front): Lissandra, The Ice Witch

card.name: Bone Skewer
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls. Then put the creature you control onto the top of your library.

card.name: Monster Harpoon
card.text: Plunder: Monster Harpoon costs {2} less to cast this turn. (If an opponent was dealt damage this turn, Monster Harpoon costs {2} less to cast this turn.) Monster Harpoon deals 5 damage to target creature.

card.name: Ardent Tracker
card.text: Scout (Once in your pre-combat main phase, you may have any number of creatures with Scout declare an attack without tapping. Opponents may declare blockers as if it were the combat phase.) Ardent Tracker costs {1} less to cast for each Knight you've cast this turn.

card.name: Cithria, Lady of Clouds
card.text: Challenger (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.) When Cithria enters, double the power and toughness of each creature you control and give them Challenger.

card.name: Succumb to the Cold
card.text: Frostbite target creature an opponent controls. (A creature with frostbite gains -X/-0 where X is that creatures power until the end of the turn.) Create a Frozen Thrall token.

card.name: Buried in Ice
card.text: Exile all creatures opponents control. Return those creatures to the battlefield under their owners control at the beginning of the end step on your next turn.

card.name: Incisive Tactician
card.text: If you have Reputation: Incisive Tactician costs {2} less to cast. (Whenever a creature you control deals 5 or more combat damage, you gain a Reputation counter. You have Reputation if you have four or more Reputation counters) When Incisive Tactician enters, after this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: Thrashing Snapper
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures block Thrashing Snapper, it gets +3/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Chirean Sumpworker
card.text: Skulk (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.) When another Chirean Sumpworker you control enters, transform all creatures named Chirean Sumpworker you control. --- (Back): Sumpworks Posse

card.name: Sumpworks Posse
card.text: Skulk (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.) Whenever Sumpworks Posse attacks, Sumpworks Posse deals 1 damage to the defending opponent. --- (Front): Chirean Sumpworker

card.name: Adaptatron 3000
card.text: Whenever a construct creature you control enters, Adaptatron 3000 gets that creatures abilities.

card.name: First Wave
card.text: When First Wave enters, create a Prey token. --- (Back): Last Wind

card.name: Last Wind
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this card, sacrifice a creature you control. --- (Front): First Wave

card.name: Zinneia, Steel Crescendo
card.text: When Zinneia enters, create a tapped and attacking Blade token. Whenever one or more token creature you control attack, Zinneia attacks target opponent.

card.name: Vanguard's Edge
card.text: Target creature you control attacks target opponent. Create three tapped and attacking Blade tokens.

card.name: Blossoming Blade
card.text: When Blossoming Blade enters, create two tapped and attacking Blade tokens.

card.name: Coastal Defender
card.text: Whenever another creature you control enters, Coastal Defender gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Syncopation
card.text: If a spell or ability is targeting up to two creatures you control, change the targets of target spell or ability to a creature you control.

card.name: Ribbon Dancer
card.text: When Ribbon Dancer enters, create a tapped and attacking Blade token.

card.name: Lead and Follow
card.text: Recall target creature you control, then create two tapped and attacking Blade tokens. (A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.)

card.name: Shadows of the Past
card.text: Recall target creature you control, then create a Living Shadow token. (A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.)

card.name: Dancing Droplet
card.text: Whenever Dancing Droplet leaves the battlefield, draw a card.

card.name: Irelia, The Blade Dancer
card.text: First strike, Attune {C} (When a creature with Attune enters, add {C}. This mana can only be used used to cast instants and sorceries.) When Irelia enters and at the beginning of your pre-combat main phase, create two tapped and attacking Blade tokens. Whenever one or more creatures you control attack, put that many Dancer counters onto Irelia. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Irelia has fourteen or more Dancer tokens, remove all Dancer tokens from Irelia, then transform her. Partner --- (Back): Irelia, The Defiant Blade

card.name: Irelia, The Defiant Blade
card.text: First strike At the beginning of your pre-combat main phase, create two tapped and attacking Blade tokens. {U}: Remove Irelia from combat and untap her. Then if a spell or ability is targeting Irelia, you may choose another creature you control as the new target for target spell or ability. You may only activate this ability once per turn. --- (Front): Irelia, The Blade Dancer

card.name: Rockfall Path
card.text: Vanishing 2 When Rockfall Path is sacrificed with no time counters, exile the creature with the lowest power among creatures opponents control.

card.name: Stonebreaker
card.text: When Stonebreaker enters, if there are four or more landmarks in your graveyard, Stonebreaker deals 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker and 2 damage to that permanents controller.

card.name: Terra Elemental
card.text: Trample If there are four or more landmarks in your graveyard, Terra Elemental gets +3/+0.

card.name: Blue Sentinel
card.text: When Blue Sentinel is destroyed create a Crest of Insight token.

card.name: Chip
card.text: The first time a landmark you control enters, Chip gets two +1/+1 counters.

card.name: Ground Slam
card.text: Tap a target creature an opponent controls and put a stun counter on it. If there is a landmark in your graveyard, Ground Slam deals 3 damage to that creature.

card.name: Eye of the Ra-Horak
card.text: Vanishing 1 When Eye of the Ra-Horak is sacrificed with no time counters, tap up to two target creatures with the lowest power among creatures opponents controls and put a stun counter on them. Daybreak: create a token copy of Eye of the Ra-Horak with Vanishing 2. (If this spell is the first spell you have cast this turn, when this spell is cast, create a token copy of Eye of the Ra-Horak with Vanishing 2. )

card.name: Solari Sunhawk
card.text: Daybreak: tap target creature an opponent controls and put a stun counter on it. (If this creature is the first spell you have cast this turn, when Solari Sunhawk enters, tap target creature an opponent controls and put a stun counter on it)

card.name: Spiral Stairs
card.text: Vanishing 3 When Spiral Stairs is sacrificed with no time counters, target creature you control gets +3/+2 and Trample.

card.name: Malphite
card.text: Absorb 1 When Malphite enters, tap target creature an opponent controls and put a stun counter on it. Whenever you cast a Landmark card, put X Terra counters on Malphite where X is that permanents mana value. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Malphite has ten or more Terra counters, remove all Terra counters from Malphite, then transform him. Partner --- (Back): Malphite

card.name: Malphite
card.text: Absorb 1 When Malphite transforms, tap target creature an opponent controls and put a stun counter on it. At the start of your upkeep, you may pay {1}{W}{U}, if you do, tap each creature target opponent controls and put a stun counter on each creature tapped this way. --- (Front): Malphite

card.name: Redfin Hammersnout
card.text: Lurk (The first time each turn one or more creatures you control with Lurk attacks, reveal the top card of your library, if the revealed card has Lurk, you get a Lurk counter. All creatures you control with Lurk have +X/+0 where X is equal to the number of Lurk counters you have.) When Redfin Hammersnout enters, target creature an opponent controls gets Vulnerable. (When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature of your choice that you control, even if that creature cannot normally block.)

card.name: Snapjaw Swarm
card.text: Lurk (The first time each turn one or more creatures you control with Lurk attacks, reveal the top card of your library, if the revealed card has Lurk, you get a Lurk counter. All creatures you control with Lurk have +X/+0 where X is equal to the number of Lurk counters you have.) Snapjaw Swarm enters tapped and attacking.

card.name: Pyke
card.text: First strike, Lurk (The first time each turn one or more creatures you control with Lurk attacks, reveal the top card of your library, if the revealed card has Lurk, you get a Lurk counter. All creatures you control with Lurk have +X/+0 where X is equal to the number of Lurk counters you have.) Whenever Pyke deals damage, put that many Ripper counters on Pyke. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Pyke has fifteen or more Ripper counters, remove all Ripper counters from Pyke, then transform him. Partner --- (Back): Pyke, The Bloodharbor Ripper

card.name: Pyke, The Bloodharbor Ripper
card.text: First strike, Lurk (The first time each turn one or more creatures you control with Lurk attacks, reveal the top card of your library, if the revealed card has Lurk, you get a Lurk counter. All creatures you control with Lurk have +X/+0 where X is equal to the number of Lurk counters you have.) Whenever Pyke destroys a creature an opponent controls, Pyke deals damage equal to his power to the creature with the lowest power among creatures opponents control. --- (Front): Pyke

card.name: The List
card.text: Target creature an opponent controls gets Vulnerable. If that creature already has Vulnerable, then the creature with the highest power you control and that creature fight. (When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature of your choice that you control, even if that creature cannot normally block.)

card.name: Jaull-fish
card.text: Lurk (The first time each turn one or more creatures you control with Lurk attacks, reveal the top card of your library, if the revealed card has Lurk, you get a Lurk counter. All creatures you control with Lurk have +X/+0 where X is equal to the number of Lurk counters you have.) When Jaull-fish enters, each creature you control with Lurk randomly attacks an opponent. (Randomly choose a target for each creature.)

card.name: Ripper's Bay
card.text: Lurk (The first time each turn one or more creatures you control with Lurk attacks, reveal the top card of your library, if the revealed card has Lurk, you get a Lurk counter. All creatures you control with Lurk have +X/+0 where X is equal to the number of Lurk counters you have.) The top card of your library is treated as if it has Lurk.

card.name: Reaver's Row
card.text: Vanishing 2 Whenever one or more time counters is removed from Reaver's Row, search your library for a creature with mana value 1, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. When Reaver's Row is sacrificed with no time counters, all creatures you control with mana value 1 get +2/+1 and Fearsome. (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.)

card.name: Line 'Em Up
card.text: Kicker {B} (You may pay an additional {B} as you cast this spell.) Create a Powder Keg. If this spell was kicked, Line ‘Em Up deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Sharkling
card.text: Lurk (The first time each turn one or more creatures you control with Lurk attacks, reveal the top card of your library, if the revealed card has Lurk, you get a Lurk counter. All creatures you control with Lurk have +X/+0 where X is equal to the number of Lurk counters you have.)

card.name: Field Promotion
card.text: The next creature that you control enters with Scout and is a Knight in addition to its creature types. (Once in your pre-combat main phase, you may have any number of creatures with Scout declare an attack without tapping. Opponents may declare blockers as if it were the combat phase.)

card.name: Swiftwing Flight
card.text: Challenger (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.) When Swiftwing Flight enters, search your library and/or graveyard for a card named Silverwing Vanguard, Blinding Assault, or Fleetfeather Tracker, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle. When Swiftwing Flight attacks, other attacking creatures you control with Challenger get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Fabled Poro
card.text: When Fabled Poro enters, choose an ability from among first strike, flying, deathtouch, double strike, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, skulk, trample, and vigilance. Target other poro creature you control gets that ability.

card.name: Abominable Guardian
card.text: At the start of your pre-combat main phase, if you control two or more yeti creatures, you may put Abominable Guardian from your hand onto the battlefield, if you do, create an exiled copy of Abominable Guardian, you may cast that copy from exile for as long as it remains exiled. When you cast Abominable Guardian, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a yeti creature card, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Defiant Dance
card.text: Recall target creature you control, then create a tapped and attacking Blade token. (A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.)

card.name: Sacred Protector
card.text: When Sacred Protector enters, put a shield counter on other target creature you control. Then search your library and/or graveyard for a card named Master Shen, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle. Creatures you control with a shield counter have double strike.

card.name: Starlit Epiphany
card.text: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three Celestial cards, randomly choose one and add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. For the rest of the turn whenever you cast a spell, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three Celestial cards, randomly choose one and add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Heavens Aligned
card.text: Focus (This instant cannot be cast during the combat phase or in response to another spell or ability.) Daybreak: reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a card with Nightfall, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. (If this spell is the first spell you have cast this turn, when this spell is cast, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a card with Nightfall, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library) Nightfall: reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a card with Daybreak, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. (If this spell is not the first spell you have cast this turn, when this spell is cast, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a card with Daybreak, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library)

card.name: Thorned Blade
card.text: Target creature you control gets +5/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Atakhan, Bringer of Ruin
card.text: Trample When Atakhan enters, put the creature with the highest power from among creatures in your graveyard onto the battlefield. When Atakhan attacks, it gets +X/+0 where X is equal to the total power of all other creatures you control.

card.name: The Twisted Treeline
card.text: Whenever a creature you control with Fearsome or Nightfall attacks, put that many charge counters on The Twisted Treeline. When The Twisted Treeline has three or more charge counters, you may sacrifice it to create a Vilemaw token.

card.name: Astral Fox
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) When Astral Fox enters, sacrifice a creature you control to have Astral Fox deal 3 damage to target opponent.

card.name: Glorious Evolution
card.text: Spells you control cost {1} less to cast. All creatures you control have Upgrade. (Whenever you cast an artifact, creatures you control with Upgrade get a +1/+1 counter.) All permanents you control are artifacts in addition to their other types.

card.name: Boom Baboon
card.text: When Boom Baboon enters, search your library and/or graveyard for a card named Flame Chompers!, reveal it, then put it onto the battlefield. If you search your library this way, shuffle.

card.name: Volunteer Elnuk
card.text: When Volunteer Elnuk enters, search your library for an Elnuk creature, reveal it, shuffle, then randomly put it into the top six cards of your library.

card.name: Practical Perfectionist
card.text: When Practical Perfectionist enters, look at the top three cards of your library, choose and reveal one, create three exiled copies of the chosen card, then put it on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order. You may cast the copies from exile for as long as they remain in exile.

card.name: Called Shot
card.text: Focus (This instant cannot be cast during the combat phase or in response to another spell or ability.) Kicker {2}{U}{R} (You may pay an additional {2}{U}{R} as you cast this spell.) Draw a card. If this spell was kicked, create a tapped and attacking copy of each creature you control, except they have ephemeral. (That creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.)

card.name: Time Trick
card.text: Predict, then draw a card. (Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.)

card.name: Dropboarder
card.text: If Dropboarder appears whenever you Scry, Surveil, or Predict, reveal it, then put it onto the battlefield. (Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.)

card.name: Timewinder
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this card, discard a card. Timewinder deals 1 damage to any target and 1 damage to any other target.

card.name: Fallen Feline
card.text: If Fallen Feline appears whenever you Scry, Surveil, or Predict, you may pay {U}{R} and reveal it, if you do, each opponent loses 2 life, then put Fallen Feline into your hand. (Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.)

card.name: Ekko, The Boy Savior
card.text: First strike Whenever Ekko deals combat damage you may pay {1}{UR}, if you do, Predict then draw a card. (Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.) Whenever you Scry, Surveil, or Predict, put a Chrono counter on Ekko. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Ekko has four or more Chrono counters, remove all Chrono counters from Ekko, then transform him. Partner --- (Back): Ekko, The Boy Who Shattered Time
card.related: Ekko, The Boy Who Shattered Time

card.name: Ekko, The Boy Who Shattered Time
card.text: First strike Whenever Ekko deals combat damage, Predict then draw a card. (Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.) {1}{U}{R}: Put all creatures you control that were destroyed this turn from the graveyard onto the battlefield. You may activate this ability once per turn. Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Front): Ekko, The Boy Savior

card.name: Ruined Rex
card.text: When Ruined Rex enters, Ruined Rex deals 2 damage to a random target opponent or a creature or planeswalker they control. Repeat this process for each card you have drawn this turn.

card.name: Kadregrin the Ruined
card.text: Fury (When this creature destroys another creature, put a +1/+1 counter on it.) When Kadregrin the Ruined enters, target other creature gets a +1/+1 counter and Challenger. (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.)

card.name: Ruined Dragonguard
card.text: If one or more +1/+1 counters would be put on a creature with fury you control, that many plus one +1/+1 counters are put on it instead.

card.name: Rimefang Denmother
card.text: When Rimefang Denmother enters, create a Rimefang Pack token.

card.name: Scattered Pod
card.text: When Scattered Pod enters, choose instant or sorcery, then reveal from the top of your library until you reveal a card of the chosen type, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. If you are Enlightened, Scattered Pod has Shadow. (The first time you spend 10 or more mana in the same turn, you are Enlightened for the rest of the game.)

card.name: Frightened Ibex
card.text: Whenever a creature you control targets Frightened Ibex, Frightened Ibex and that creature get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Retired Reckoner
card.text: Trample Whenever a source you control targets Retired Reckoner, Retired Reckoner gets +1/+0.

card.name: Ruined Reckoner
card.text: When Ruined Reckoner enters, target other creature you control attacks target opponent.

card.name: Defective Swapbot
card.text: When Defective Swapbot enters, exchange its power and toughness with the power and toughness of target creature.

card.name: Akshan's Grappling Hook
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to any target.

card.name: Thrumming Swarm
card.text: Trample When Thrumming Swarm enters, if you control a transformed legendary creature, create an exiled copy of Thrumming Swarm. You may cast copies of Thrumming Swarm exiled this way for as long as it remains exiled.

card.name: The Absolver
card.text: Kicker {U}{B} (You may pay an additional {U}{B} as you cast this spell.) Target creature you control gets +2/+1 until the end of your next turn. If this spell was kicked, the target creature gets Trample and +4/+2 until the end of your next turn instead.

card.name: Akshan the Vigilante
card.text: First strike When Akshan enters, or whenever Akshan deals combat damage, choose one — • Search your library and/or graveyard and/or exile for a card named Warlord's Palace, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle. • Remove a time counter from a Warlord's Palace you control. When an Enchantment Landmark you control named Warlord's Palace is sacrificed with no time counters, transform Akshan. Partner --- (Back): Akshan, The Rogue Sentinel

card.name: Akshan, The Rogue Sentinel
card.text: First strike Whenever Akshan deals combat damage, choose one — • All creatures opponents control get Vulnerable. Create an exiled copy of the creature with the highest power among creatures you control that was destroyed this turn, you may cast that copy from exile without paying its mana cost this turn. (When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature of your choice that you control, even if that creature cannot normally block.) • Draw two cards. Spells you control cost {1} less to cast this turn. • Legendary creatures you control get two +1/+1 counters and a spellshield counter. (The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.) --- (Front): Akshan the Vigilante

card.name: Warlord's Palace
card.text: Vanishing 8 When Warlord's Palace is sacrificed with no time counters, choose one: • Predict, then draw a card. (Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.) • Create a Sandstone Charger token. • All creatures you control gets +1/+0.

card.name: Crawling Viperwyrm
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this card, choose one — • Crawling Viperwyrm deals 3 damage to target creature you control. • You lose 3 life. Fury (When this creature destroys another creature, put a +1/+1 counter on it.)

card.name: Camavoran Dragon
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this card, choose one — • Camavoran Dragon deals 3 damage to target creature you control. • You lose 3 life. Fearsome, Fury (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. When this creature destroys another creature, put a +1/+1 counter on it.) Whenever Camavoran Dragon destroys a creature, target opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Viego's Despair
card.text: Destroy target creature. You lose life equal to that creatures power.

card.name: Withering Mist
card.text: Withering Mist deals 2 damage to any two targets. You gain 4 life.

card.name: Viego the Resurrected
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) The first time each turn a creature you control is destroyed, create an Encroaching Mist token. Whenever a creature you control named Encroaching Mist enters, you get an experience counter. Viego has +1/+1 for each experience counter you have. Whenever a creature you control is destroyed, put X Ruin counters on Viego where X is that creatures power. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Viego has twenty or more Ruin counters, remove all Ruin counters from Viego, then transform him. Partner --- (Back): Viego, The Ruined King

card.name: Viego, The Ruined King
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) The first time each turn a creature you control is destroyed, create a Encroaching Mist token. Whenever a creature you control named Encroaching Mist enters, you get an experience counter. Viego has +1/+1 for each experience counter you have. At the beginning of your upkeep, gain control of the creature with the highest power among creature opponents control. --- (Front): Viego the Resurrected

card.name: Encroaching Mist LORT-EOTA
card.text: Ephemeral (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.) This creature has +1/+1 for each experience counter you have.

card.name: Camavoran Soldier
card.text: When Camavoran Soldier enters, create an Encroaching Mist token.

card.name: Invasive Hydravine
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) When Invasive Hydravine enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, create an Encroaching Mist token.

card.name: Gallant Rider
card.text: The first time Gallant Rider is blocked, transform Gallant Rider. --- (Back): Vanguard Cavalry

card.name: Vanguard Cavalry
card.text: Absorb 1 (If a source would deal damage to this creature, prevent 1 of that damage.) --- (Front): Gallant Rider

card.name: Blade LORT-EOTA
card.text: Decayed (This creature can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Frostguard Thrall LORT-EOTA
card.text: Trample

card.name: The Watcher LORT-EOTA
card.text: The Watcher enters tapped with 17 stun counters, while a stun counter is on The Watcher, it has protection from its controller. Whenever you cast a creature, remove X stun counters from The Watcher where X is that creatures mana value. Whenever The Watcher attacks, exile the defending players library except the bottom three cards.

card.name: Rimefang Pack LORT-EOTA
card.text: Rimefang Pack has +1/+0 for each creature with power 0 opponents control.

card.name: Watery Grave
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {B}.) As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: Underground Sea
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {B}.)

card.name: Dimir Aqueduct
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, return a land you control to its owner's hand. {T}: Add {U}{B}.

card.name: Crest of Insight LORT-EOTA
card.text: Vanishing 1 (This permanent enters with a time counter on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter from it. When the last is removed, sacrifice it.) When Crest is sacrificed with no time counters, add one mana of any colour.
